series_metadata.series_title: Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) Division Files
series_metadata.series_description: Files that include, for each, Area Agencies on Aging their Affirmative Action Plan, Board and Advisory Council Minutes, Correspondence, Reference Materials (newsletters, annual reports, etc, Transfers/Waivers, Notices, Notice of Grant Awards/Agreements, and Reports

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: files that include federal funds
